title: Resume Ingestion & Vectorization
description: LinkedIn profile scraper builds vectorized resume JSON with TF-IDF token vocabulary (60+ terms), taxonomy tagging across 6 security domains, and structured candidate profile including experience, certifications, skills, and salary range. Outputs resume.json as the authoritative candidate profile for all scoring operations.

title: SQLite Job Database
description: WAL-mode SQLite database with 6 tables: jobs (24 columns incl. embedding_vector BLOB), submissions (outcome tracking), qa_bank (normalized Q&A with confidence scoring), checkpoint (run state), search_profiles (keyword/filter configs). Indexed on status, fit_score DESC, company, scraped_at. Foreign keys enforced.

title: Multi-Factor Fit Scoring Engine
description: 100-point scoring algorithm: skills_overlap (30pt direct match), taxonomy_overlap (25pt Jaccard coefficient over security domains), vector_similarity (20pt TF-IDF cosine), title_match (15pt keyword), seniority_match (10pt level alignment). 65-point application threshold. Breakdown stored per job for auditability.

title: Search Profile Configuration
description: JSON-configured search profiles with keyword lists, location filters, Easy Apply toggle, under-10-applicants filter, and in-network preference. Supports multiple profiles for different role types (DLP, cloud security, architect). Tracks total runs and applications per profile.

title: Taxonomy Classification System
description: 6 security domains (cybersecurity, cloud_security, governance, identity, data, network) with 50+ sub-classifications. 7-tier seniority map (IC through C-Suite). 5-category tool registry (SIEM, EDR, DLP, Cloud, GRC) with 25+ vendor products. Used for Jaccard overlap scoring and job categorization.

title: File Bridge IPC (Watcher v2.0)
description: Python file-based IPC bridge between Claude browser agent and local filesystem. Watches ~/Downloads for linkedin_cmd_*.json at 400ms intervals. 10 operation types: ping, read/write_file, sql_exec/query/many/script, list_dir, checkpoint_update, qa_upsert. v2.0 adds auto-persist of all response files to data/responses/ for project-local audit trail.

title: Q&A Knowledge Bank
description: Persistent knowledge bank for application form answers. Question normalization (lowercase, strip punctuation, whitespace reduction). Lookup-first strategy: stored answers prioritized over resume-derived generation. Tracks confidence score, times_used, last_used per entry. Creates compounding data asset across application sessions.

title: Checkpoint & Resume-from-Failure
description: State checkpointed after every successful action (scrape, score, apply, skip). Tracks run_id, search_profile, last_job_id/page/index, counters (scraped/applied/skipped/errored), timestamps. Enables resume-from-failure on watcher restart or browser disconnect. Atomic JSON writes with timestamp.

title: LinkedIn Easy Apply Agent
description: Claude browser agent operating inside real Chrome session. 7-phase pipeline: resume_ingest, db_init, search_scrape, score_jobs, apply_queue, checkpoint_write. Rate limited 1.5-4s between actions, 3 retries per operation. Human-in-the-loop for errors and CAPTCHAs. No fingerprint spoofing or CAPTCHA bypass.

title: Showcase & OpsDocs Server
description: Python HTTP server on port 8083 serving glassmorphism OpsDocs dashboard. 7 tabs: Overview (live stats, score distribution, checkpoint), Pipeline (all jobs table), Candidate (profile/skills/experience), Taxonomy (domain/seniority/tool viewer), Architecture (SVG system diagram), Audit Trail (response file viewer), Presenter Console (4-scenario narratives: investor/partner/product/internal). Auto-refresh 10s with live SQLite reads.

title: CCEM APM Showcase Integration
description: Registered in CCEM APM showcase registry at localhost:3032/showcase/linkedin-job-automation. Features list, narrative content, and speaker notes for presentation mode. Integrated with APM session tracking and project-level monitoring.

title: Response Audit Persistence
description: All IPC command/response pairs auto-persisted from ~/Downloads to data/responses/ within the project directory. Watcher v2.0 copies on-write and scans for externally created responses. 13 response files tracked covering: ping, verify, checkpoint, DB reads, batch inserts, submissions, Q&A upserts, session updates. Full auditability of every bridge operation.
